title: Troll plugin
description: This plugin allows you to troll other players and send them messages
body:
![(plugin logo)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd124692815d64d38249a7d6fd8bce857fc30d7.png)
## - **Descriotion:**
This plugin allows you to troll players: blow them up, send lightning at them (there will be more ways in the future), and the plugin also allows you to send messages to players along with the troll.
## - **commands:**

```
 /tnt [player] [message] - you can send someone a TNT with message
 /lightning [player] [messege] - you can send someone a lightning with message
 /SnowBall [player] [message] - You can throw 10 snowballs at someone.
 /Poison [player] [message] - You can poison someone for 5 seconds.
```

## - **cost of commands:**

- /tnt - 10 diamonds
- /lightning - 5 diamonds
- /SnowBall - 3 diamonds
- /Poison - 7 diamonds
